== Notes for [[Item:Q57040|Q57040]] ==

"'''México, bautismos, 1560-1950'''," index, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/pal:/MM9.1.1/JMB3-FL8 : accessed 09 Apr 2014), Alonso De Onate, 31 Oct 1606; citing Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico, reference p 37; FHL microfilm 35168. ... Name: '''Alonso De Onate'''; Gender: Male; '''Christening Date: 31 Oct 1606'''; '''Christening Place: Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Father's Name: Alonso de Onate; Mother's Name: Ynes De Ribadeneyra

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBF69701EFBBFA9822EF79916CB259
geni:6000000025663891751

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
